infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: Pallinky uses your calendar so you can add an event to your schedule after you create or join a plan.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Pallinky uses your calendar so you can add an event to your schedule after you create or join a plan.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Pallinky uses your camera so you can take a profile photo.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Pallinky uses your location while you use the app to suggest nearby venues and help you choose an address for your plan.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Pallinky uses your contacts to help you quickly invite friends to your events.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Pallinky uses your photo library so you can choose a profile photo or add an image to an event. For example, you can select a photo for your profile or upload an event cover image.
infoPlist.NSRemindersFullAccessUsageDescription: Pallinky uses your reminders only if you choose to create a reminder for a plan or event.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: Pallinky uses your reminders only if you choose to create a reminder for a plan or event.
infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Pallinky sends notifications for invites, chat updates, and event changes.
